title: Roadmap: hunch must dogfood Architectural Conformance — its own graph has zero conformance predicates
context: Smoke audit: `hunch conform` on hunch itself returns 'No architectural invariants recorded yet' — the README-headline feature is unused in the flagship repo. The wiki's core intents are conformance-expressible (e.g. renderAdoptedDoc must not-call writeFileSync directly; public-home reads must reach loadAll not recs).
decision: Record 3-5 conformance predicates over hunch's own graph (subscription-strip reaches pexecIn, wiki public home not-calls recs, upsertSection reached by every grounding writer) so `hunch conform --strict` guards the invariants the constraints only describe in prose.
